class.name: VoodooI2CMultitouchHIDEventDriver
class.brief: Implements an HID Event Driver for HID devices that expose a digitiser usage page.
class.doc: The members of this class are responsible for parsing, processing and interpreting digitiser-related HID objects.

subclass.name: VoodooI2CTouchscreenHIDEventDriver
subclass.brief: Implements an HID Event Driver for touchscreen devices as well as stylus input.

subclass.name: VoodooI2CPrecisionTouchpadHIDEventDriver
subclass.brief: Implements an HID Event Driver for Precision Touchpad devices as specified by Microsoft's protocol in the following document: https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/windows-hardware/design/component-guidelines/precision-touchpad-devices

argument.name: element
argument.doc: The element to be calibrated

argument.name: removalPercentage
argument.doc: The percentage by which the element is calibrated

method.name: didTerminate
method.brief: Notification that a provider has been terminated, sent after recursing up the stack, in leaf-to-root order.

argument.name: options
argument.doc: The terminated provider of this object.

argument.name: defer
argument.doc: If there is pending I/O that requires this object to persist, and the provider is not opened by this object set defer to true and call the IOService::didTerminate() implementation when the I/O completes. Otherwise, leave defer set to its default value of false.

method.name: getElementValue
method.brief: Gets the latest value of an element by issuing a getReport request to the
method.doc: device. Necessary due to changes between 10.11 and 10.12.

method.name: handleDigitizerReport
method.brief: Called during the interrupt routine to interate over transducers

argument.name: timestamp
argument.doc: The timestamp of the interrupt report

argument.name: report_id
argument.doc: The report ID of the interrupt report

method.name: handleDigitizerTransducerReport
method.brief: Called during the interrupt routine to set transducer values

argument.name: transducer
argument.doc: The transducer to be updated

argument.name: timestamp
argument.doc: The timestamp of the interrupt report

argument.name: report_id
argument.doc: The report ID of the interrupt report

method.name: handleInterruptReport
method.brief: Called during the interrupt routine to handle an interrupt report

argument.name: timestamp
argument.doc: The timestamp of the interrupt report

argument.name: report
argument.doc: A buffer containing the report data

argument.name: report_type
argument.doc: The type of HID report

argument.name: report_id
argument.doc: The report ID of the interrupt report

method.name: handleStart
method.brief: Called during the start routine to set up the HID Event Driver
method.doc: This function is reponsible for opening a client connection with the <IOHIDInterface> provider and for publishing a multitouch interface into the IOService plane.

argument.name: provider
argument.doc: The <IOHIDInterface> object which we have matched against.

method.name: handleStop
method.brief: Called during the stop routine to terminate the HID Event Driver
method.doc: This function is reponsible for releasing the resources allocated in VoodooI2CMultitouchHIDEventDriver::start

argument.name: provider
argument.doc: The <IOHIDInterface> object which we have matched against.

method.name: message
parseDigitizerElement
method.brief: Parses a digitiser usage page element
method.doc: This function is reponsible for examining the child elements of a digitser elements to determine the capabilities of the digitiser.

return.doc: *kIOReturnSuccess* on successful parse, *kIOReturnNotFound* if the digitizer element is not supported

argument.name: element
argument.doc: The element to parse

method.name: parseDigitizerTransducerElement
method.doc: This function is reponsible for examining the transducers of a digitiser to determine the capabilities of the transducer.

return.doc: *kIOReturnSuccess* on successful parse, *kIOReturnDeviceError*, *kIOReturnError* or *kIOReturnNoDevice* if the transducer element is not supported

argument.name: element
argument.doc: The element to parse

argument.name: parent
argument.doc: The parent digitiser

method.name: parseElementPhysicalMax
method.doc: This function factors reported dimensions with units and exponent.

return.doc: Physical max dimension in 0.01 mm units.

argument.name: element
argument.doc: The element to parse.

return.doc: *kIOReturnSuccess* on successful parse, *kIOReturnNotFound* if the matched elements are not supported, *kIOReturnError* otherwise

method.name: processDigitizerElements
method.doc: This function is mostly copied from Apple's own HID Event Driver code. It is responsible for cleaning up malformed report descriptors as well as setting some miscellaneous properties.

method.name: publishMultitouchInterface
method.brief: Publishes a VoodooI2CMultitouchInterface into the IOService plane

method.name: setButtonState
method.brief: Sets a button state to the given value

argument.name: state
argument.doc: The button state to be set

argument.name: bit
argument.doc: The bit in which to write the value

argument.name: value
argument.doc: The value to be written

argument.name: timestamp
argument.doc: The timestamp pertaining to the value

method.name: setDigitizerProperties
method.brief: Publishes some miscellaneous properties to the IOService plane

method.name: setPowerState
method.brief: Called by the OS in order to notify the driver that the device should change power state
method.doc: This function exists to be overriden by inherited classes should they need it.

argument.name: whichState
argument.doc: The power state the device is expected to enter represented by either *kIOPMPowerOn* or *kIOPMPowerOff*

argument.name: whatDevice
argument.doc: The power management policy maker

method.name: setProperties
start
method.brief: Implemented to set a certain property

argument.name: provider
argument.doc: The <IOHIDInterface> object which we have matched against.
